prose: **Water HOMO–LUMO gap** — DFT, tier 'standard' (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: fixed coordinates (user-provided `.xyz` file) — no relaxation run in this task. SCF converged in 7 cycles. HOMO = −8.60 eV, LUMO = +0.34 eV → **gap = 8.94 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an excitation energy). The `.xyz` file was `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz`, and the live `.out` log recorded progress at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp3gmvq7v1/live.json`.
